import ast, sys, os

files = [
    'backend/app/core/redis.py',
    'backend/app/utils/audit.py',
    'backend/app/core/config.py',
    'backend/app/modules/auth/models.py',
    'backend/app/modules/auth/services.py',
    'backend/app/modules/auth/schemas.py',
    'backend/app/modules/auth/routers.py',
    'backend/app/core/security.py',
    'backend/app/modules/admin/schemas.py',
    'backend/app/modules/admin/services.py',
    'backend/app/modules/admin/routers/users.py',
    'backend/app/main.py',
]

errors = []
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'  OK  {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        errors.append\(f'FAIL {f}: {e}'\)
        print\(f'FAIL {f}: {e}'\)

if errors:
    sys.exit\(1\)
else:
    print\('\\\\nAll Python files parsed successfully.'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import ast, sys

files = [
    'backend/app/core/redis.py',
    'backend/app/utils/audit.py',
    'backend/app/core/config.py',
    'backend/app/modules/auth/models.py',
    'backend/app/modules/auth/services.py',
    'backend/app/modules/auth/schemas.py',
    'backend/app/modules/auth/routers.py',
    'backend/app/core/security.py',
    'backend/app/modules/admin/schemas.py',
    'backend/app/modules/admin/services.py',
    'backend/app/modules/admin/routers/users.py',
    'backend/app/main.py',
]
errors = []
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'  OK  {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        errors.append\(f\)
        print\(f'FAIL {f}: {e}'\)
sys.exit\(len\(errors\)\)
")
